# Domain Quality Scorecard Template

> Fill in this template for each domain during certification or periodic review.

## Domain: `{{domain_name}}`
**Owner**: {{owner}}
**Version**: {{version}}
**Date**: {{date}}

---

## Scores (0.0 – 1.0)

| Dimension | Score | Notes |
|-----------|-------|-------|
| Test Coverage | — | % of code covered by tests |
| Lint / Static Analysis | — | 0 errors = 1.0, warnings penalized |
| Documentation Freshness | — | All prompts/manifests documented |
| Certification Status | — | 1.0 = certified, 0.0 = uncertified |
| Observability Compliance | — | Structured logging enabled |
| Port Compatibility | — | No breaking changes vs prior version |

**Overall Score**: `(sum / 6)`

---

## Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests present
- [ ] Integration tests present
- [ ] Replay fixtures exist
- [ ] Minimum 80% coverage on critical paths

Coverage: **{{coverage_pct}}%**

---

## Lint / Static Analysis

- [ ] `ruff check` passes with 0 errors
- [ ] `mypy` passes with 0 type errors
- [ ] No `TODO` / `FIXME` in production code

Lint score: **{{lint_score}}**

---

## Documentation Freshness

- [ ] `domain.yaml` has `purpose` field
- [ ] All agents have `system_prompt.md`
- [ ] All public functions have docstrings
- [ ] `docs/references/` updated

Doc freshness: **{{doc_score}}**

---

## Certification

- [ ] `./ai validate` passes
- [ ] `./ai certify` passes
- [ ] Certification recorded in catalog

Status: **{{cert_status}}** (certified / not certified)

---

## Observability

- [ ] `StructuredLogger` used in all agents
- [ ] Trace IDs propagated
- [ ] Metrics emitted on run completion

Compliance: **{{obs_score}}**

---

## Port Compatibility

- [ ] No breaking port schema changes
- [ ] `CompatibilityRegistry` updated for new ports
- [ ] Cross-domain connections validated

Compatibility: **{{compat_score}}**
